query:
-- Conversation summaries for long-term memory
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conversationSummaries (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  conversationId INT NOT NULL,
  fanUserId INT NOT NULL,
  personalityId INT NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  keyTopics JSON,
  emotionalTone VARCHAR(50),
  messageRangeStart INT NOT NULL,
  messageRangeEnd INT NOT NULL,
  messageCount INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- User facts/preferences extracted from conversations
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS userMemories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  fanUserId INT NOT NULL,
  personalityId INT NOT NULL,
  memoryType ENUM('fact', 'preference', 'interest', 'relationship', 'goal', 'experience', 'context') NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(100),
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  confidence DECIMAL(3, 2) DEFAULT 0.80 NOT NULL,
  sourceMessageId INT,
  sourceConversationId INT,
  timesUsed INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lastUsedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  isVerified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Knowledge base for RAG system
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledgeBase (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  contentType ENUM('platform_feature', 'how_to', 'best_practice', 'faq', 'pricing', 'policy', 'tip', 'industry') NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  tags JSON,
  embedding JSON,
  priority INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Chat context cache for faster retrieval
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chatContextCache (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  conversationId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  fanUserId INT NOT NULL,
  personalityId INT NOT NULL,
  recentSummary TEXT,
  activeMemories JSON,
  activeKnowledge JSON,
  conversationMood VARCHAR(50),
  engagementLevel ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  suggestedTopics JSON,
  suggestedLinks JSON,
  lastUpdated TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dtffFtxzpGHwBQ5.0a644b1e7093 --database DtHx6xuQiQvSJ7iXUMCHPD --execute
